description_long: This object depicts a small, rectangular graveyard plot set on a grassy terrain. The graveyard consists of a concrete or stone slab with a series of evenly spaced, upright grave markers arranged in rows. At one end of the plot, there is a prominent vertical headstone or memorial wall, which features a central plaque or inscription area and two small decorative motifs on either side. The grave markers are simple, dark-colored posts, possibly representing headstones or grave stakes. The surrounding terrain is slightly undulating, giving a naturalistic appearance to the setting. The overall design is minimalistic, with a focus on the orderly arrangement of the graves and the central memorial feature.
description: A small, rectangular graveyard with a central memorial wall and rows of upright grave markers on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid memorial wall and the tops of the grave markers arranged in rows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the graveyard and the alignment of the grave markers extending from the memorial wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the face of the memorial wall with a central plaque and decorative motifs, as well as the full arrangement of grave markers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the grave markers in profile and the thickness of the memorial wall.

license_info.creator_display_name: San Diego African American Museum of Fine Art
